# FERC Audit Explorer

> Machine-readable findings of noncompliance and staff recommendations from FERC's published **utility audit reports** — across the **electric, gas, and oil sectors** (primarily FERC Forms 1, 2, and 6, plus related forms) — issued by the Office of Enforcement, Division of Audits & Accounting. Covers both financial (FA) and non-financial (PA) audits of utilities, ISOs, RTOs, and pipelines. Each report is parsed into findings -> recommendations, and cross-report themes are mined.

Scope: FERC utility audits — electric, gas & oil. As of 2026-06-01, 120 reports are structured of 120 listed (86 electric, 17 oil, 14 gas identified). Findings and recommendations are quoted verbatim from each report's Executive Summary or findings section. Primary source: https://www.ferc.gov/audits. Independent public-interest tool, not affiliated with FERC. Links below are relative to the site root.

## Data (machine-readable)
- [Reports](data/reports.json): every structured report with findings, recommendations, and themes
- [Patterns](data/patterns.json): cross-report themes with counts by industry and year
- [Meta](data/meta.json): corpus counts and provenance
- [Full corpus text](llms-full.txt): all findings and recommendations in one file (verbatim)

## Reports
- [Kern River Gas Transmission Company](https://elibrary.ferc.gov/eLibrary/filelist?accession_number=20250929-3000&optimized=false): Docket FA23-10-000, issued 2025-09-29, financial audit, n/a, 5 finding(s) — findings: Renewable Natural Gas Quality Specifications; Tariff Administration and Oversight; Informational Postings; Allowance for Funds Used During Construction; Annual Membership Dues
- [Medallion Pipeline Company, LLC](https://elibrary.ferc.gov/eLibrary/filelist?accession_number=20250925-3005&optimized=false): Docket FA23-9-000, issued 2025-09-25, financial audit, n/a, 8 finding(s) — findings: Annual Cost of Service Based Analysis Schedule; Nonoperating and Operating Expenses; Noncarrier Property Revenue, Expenses, and Net Income; Crude Oil Accounting Misclassifications; Other Accounting Misclassifications; Property Unit Listing; Depreciation Rates and Study; FERC Form No. 6 Reporting
- [Pacific Gas and Electric Company](https://elibrary.ferc.gov/eLibrary/filelist?accession_number=20250918-3011&optimized=false): Docket FA23-8-000, issued 2025-09-18, financial audit, transmission/distribution, 8 finding(s) — findings: Allocation of Overhead Costs to CWIP; Accounting for Operating and Maintenance Expenses; Accounting for Administrative and General Expenses; Accounting for Compromise Settlements; Allowance for Funds Used During Construction; Accounting for Customer Advances; Prepayments; FERC Form No. 1 Reporting
- [Talen Energy](https://elibrary.ferc.gov/eLibrary/filelist?accession_number=20250908-3009&optimized=false): Docket PA22-7-000, issued 2025-09-08, non-financial audit, generation, 3 finding(s) — findings: Generation Outage Requests Submitted to PJM’s electronic Dispatcher Application Reporting Tool (eDART) System; Generation Outage Reporting in Generating Availability Data System (GADS); Discrepancies between Reported Generator Outages and Offer Schedules

- [Occidental Energy Marketing, Inc.](https://elibrary.ferc.gov/eLibrary/filelist?accession_number=20141024-3018&optimized=false): Docket FA14-8, issued 2014-10-24, financial audit, n/a, 0 finding(s)
- [Cargill](https://elibrary.ferc.gov/eLibrary/filelist?accession_number=20141024-3019&optimized=false): Docket FA14-6, issued 2014-10-24, financial audit, n/a, 0 finding(s)

## Common themes
- Form reporting (Form No. 1/2/6, Page 700) — Errors or omissions in the annual FERC forms utilities file. (68 report(s), 183 finding(s))
- Accounting misclassification — Costs or revenues booked to the wrong FERC account. (67 report(s), 191 finding(s))
- Depreciation — Unapproved or incorrect depreciation rates applied to plant. (40 report(s), 62 finding(s))
- Below-the-line costs (lobbying, charitable, etc.) — Non-recoverable costs (lobbying, charity, ads) charged to ratepayers. (40 report(s), 53 finding(s))
- Property & plant records — Incomplete or inaccurate utility plant and property records. (36 report(s), 63 finding(s))
- AFUDC / cost of capital — Mis-stated AFUDC — the financing cost capitalized during construction. (35 report(s), 46 finding(s))
- Affiliate / intercompany transactions — Transactions with affiliated companies mis-priced or mis-reported. (24 report(s), 34 finding(s))
- Cost of service & rates — Errors in rate-base or return inputs to cost-of-service rates. (23 report(s), 46 finding(s))
- Capitalization vs. expense — Costs capitalized that should be expensed, or the reverse. (19 report(s), 20 finding(s))
- Tariff administration & oversight — Not following the utility's own FERC-approved tariff. (18 report(s), 27 finding(s))
- Membership dues & industry associations — Trade-association dues (e.g., EEI) improperly charged to ratepayers. (11 report(s), 11 finding(s))
- Informational postings — Required public postings (e.g., OASIS) missing, late, or incomplete. (9 report(s), 15 finding(s))
- Creditworthiness — Customer credit standards not applied as the tariff requires. (1 report(s), 1 finding(s))

## Optional
- [Human-readable explorer](index.html)
- [FERC audit reports (primary source)](https://www.ferc.gov/audits)
